SETTINGS.2: Hier können Sie alle Einstellungen tätigen.
SETTINGS.3: Bitte denken Sie an regelmäßige Backups und sichern diese auch außerhalb Ihres Gerätes!
SETTINGS.title: Settings
SETTINGS.backup-speicher: The backup will always be named:
SETTINGS.pin-notiz: lock and unlock the app for students with this pin
SETTINGS.pw-notiz: password for the whole app (min. 4 signs)
SETTINGS.farbe-stunde-aktuell: Color of the current lesson in the lesson-view
SETTINGS.change-password-description: Enter your new password and confirm it.
SETTINGS.password-both-required: Please fill in both password fields
SETTINGS.password-min-length: Password must be at least 6 characters
SETTINGS.backup-create-confirm-message: Do you want to create an encrypted backup now?
SETTINGS.backup-restore-confirm-message: Please enter the password to decrypt the backup.
SETTINGS.backup-restore-warning-message: Restoring will overwrite all local data. Continue?
SETTINGS.delete-account-description: Permanently and irreversibly deletes your account and ALL associated data from the database. EVEN your authentication entry will be completely removed. This action CANNOT be undone!
SETTINGS.delete-account-confirm-message: WARNING: This action permanently and irreversibly deletes your account, ALL your data (classes, students, grades, etc.) and your complete authentication entry from the database. You will be logged out and can never log in again. This action cannot be undone under ABSOLUTELY NO circumstances!
SETTINGS.delete-account-success: Account and all data successfully deleted
SETTINGS.no-students: No students in this class yet. Use '+' to add students.
SETTINGS.no-classes: No classes yet. Use '+' to add your first class.
